title: Review: fix: contact_set atomicity, unknown-key rejection, store SQL dedup
notes:
Maintainer risk: LOW — The two genuine risks (contact Phase 2 no-transaction, SpaceMemberOp role untyped) are both latent: contacts are permanently immutable so the race can't trigger today, and there's only one call site for SpaceMemberOp. Both will bite you when the codebase grows.
Confidence: 90% chance no missed bug. Uncertainty driven by: only read the diff + store method bodies, not the full 4341-line jmap.rs or the full test suite execution. Would raise confidence if: (1) cargo test --workspace runs clean, (2) saw the full contact_set and space_set handlers in context to verify all error paths return from the function and not just break from the inner loop.
